title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero from Cursor discusses how companies plateau at 40% productivity gains with AI coding assistants and describes building agentic workflows across the entire SDLC. The presentation covers systems for bug triage, security review, growth experiments, and organizational changes needed for the agent era.
